name: deep-cuts-publishing-platform
description: Permanent publishing platform for Deep Cuts Fan Challenge editions.

scripts.validate: node scripts/validate-platform.mjs && node scripts/validate-questions.mjs && node scripts/test-engine.mjs && node scripts/test-build-tracking.mjs && node --check js/app.js && node --check js/engine.js && node --check scripts/build-tracker.mjs && node --check scripts/track-build.mjs && node --check scripts/publish-edition.mjs && node --check scripts/prepare-delivery.mjs
